certification.auditNote: SCOPE-1/2/3 implemented and verified with executed unit + integration evidence (see report.md). SCOPE-4 is operator-action (CI green + promote.sh apply/verify + users add CLI in live container + browser login smoke + cookie persistence) that no in-process agent can perform. Per BUG-045-002 precedent, SCOPE-4 DoD items are recorded as certification.unresolvedFindings with explicit operator acceptance criteria. The implementation code SCOPE-4 exercises is complete and gated by the unit + integration test matrix.

unresolvedFindings.acceptanceCriterion: Build workflow run for the commit shipping SCOPE-1/2/3 reports conclusion=success on .github/workflows/build.yml; signed core+ml images plus home-lab config bundle published to ghcr.
promote.sh --target home-lab --build-manifest <new> apply OK and ./smackerel.sh deploy-target home-lab verify OK.
tailscale ssh <host> -- docker exec smackerel-<env>-smackerel-core-1 smackerel-core users add operator prints 'user "operator" created' and inserts one row into web_user_credentials.
Opening https://<deploy-host>.<tailnet>.ts.net/login, submitting operator + chosen password, lands on / with auth_token cookie set and admin UI loads with no console errors.
Navigating to at least two distinct admin routes after login does not re-prompt for credentials.

certification.notes: Spec 070 (originally scaffolded as 063, renumbered 2026-05-31 to resolve duplicate 063 collision with knowledge-ai-enrichment) scaffolded 2026-05-30. executionHistory.note: deferred operator-action — live deploy + browser smoke

executionHistory.summary: OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed post-cert planning edits to THIS spec: 75f2e2be (2026-06-01T23:34Z round-2 convergence close-out, ~4min after faithful cert ts 23:30Z; flipped scopes 1-3 from Not Started to Done with [x] DoD evidence and deferred SCOPE-4 to operator-action, consistent with certification.unresolvedFindings OP-070-SCOPE4-* and auditVerdict passed-with-known-drift; category a plus b deferral) and b1c46991 (2026-06-05 tier-4 drift cleanup; reconciled planned-to-shipped file paths repo_postgres.go to repo.go, timing_test.go to hasher_test.go, cli_users.go to cmd_users.go; DoD checkboxes unchanged; category b). SCOPE-4 deferral and its 6 operator-action unchecked DoD predate done and are documented known-drift, not a post-promotion reset. No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.
